debug_info.goal:
m : Type → Type
inst✝² : Monad m
inst✝¹ : MonadQuotation m
inst✝ : MonadRef m
h :
  (fun str => do
      let s ←
        do
          let info ← MonadRef.mkInfoFromRefPos
          let scp ← getCurrMacroScope
          let quotCtx ← MonadQuotation.getContext
          pure
              {
                raw :=
                  Syntax.node2 info `Lean.Parser.Term.app
                    (Syntax.ident info "a".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `a scp) [])
                    (Syntax.node3 info `null (Syntax.ident info "b".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `b scp) [])
                      (Syntax.ident info "c".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `c scp) [])
                      (Syntax.node3 info `«term#[_,]» (Syntax.atom info "#[")
                        (Syntax.node5 info `null
                          (Syntax.ident info "x".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `x scp) [])
                          (Syntax.atom info ",") (quote `term str).raw (Syntax.atom info ",")
                          (Syntax.ident info "z".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `z scp) []))
                        (Syntax.atom info "]"))) }
      pure s.raw) =
    fun x => pure Syntax.missing
g : String → m Syntax :=
  fun str => do
    let s ←
      do
        let info ← MonadRef.mkInfoFromRefPos
        let scp ← getCurrMacroScope
        let quotCtx ← MonadQuotation.getContext
        pure
            {
              raw :=
                Syntax.node2 info `Lean.Parser.Term.app
                  (Syntax.ident info "a".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `a scp) [])
                  (Syntax.node3 info `null (Syntax.ident info "b".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `b scp) [])
                    (Syntax.ident info "c".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `c scp) [])
                    (Syntax.node3 info `«term#[_,]» (Syntax.atom info "#[")
                      (Syntax.node5 info `null (Syntax.ident info "x".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `x scp) [])
                        (Syntax.atom info ",") (quote `term str).raw (Syntax.atom info ",")
                        (Syntax.ident info "z".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `z scp) []))
                      (Syntax.atom info "]"))) }
    pure s.raw
this : g "hello" ≠ pure Syntax.missing
⊢ False
